title: Refresh lock with current CLI
reason: After AMEND-004, ni run reported a stale lock for docs/plan/05_constraints.md. This amendment authorizes a CLI relock of the current READY planning files with the rebuilt ni binary; no accepted planning criteria are changed.
proposed_changes: Refresh .ni/plan.lock.json through ni relock so locked hashes match the current v0.2 conversation-authoring planning files.
Keep all accepted capabilities, requirements, risks, evaluations, decisions, non-goals, and docs content unchanged from the current READY state.
risk_impact: No criteria are weakened; this preserves the lock-hash authority rule by using the CLI relock path after a detected mismatch.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because the current planning state already passes ni status.
